name: cancel-mid-stream
description: Scenario A / I2 cancellation point 2 (mid-stream) — derived from the inferbench IB-T004 profile (inferbench@caa5074 docs/evidence/ib-t004/cancel-mid-stream/workload.json; name/seed kept, unchanged), run against the composed Scenario A stack. Every request cancels after 8 client-observed output tokens. Streams the mock deterministically ends before 8 tokens complete ok (honest realized-cancel accounting). Expected realized cancels: status=canceled with output_tokens_at_cancel=8, measured TTFT and ITL kept; mock /debug/state aborts phase=mid_stream, chunks_sent>=9.
